creator: borjam@we.lc.ehu.es
text:
If a network link is broken, a TCP connection is dropped
	by a rexmit timeout after about 30 seconds. As far as I know
	this is incorrect.

How-To-Repeat: 
	
	For example, telnet to a machine, power down a router between
	the origin and the destination, and press some keys. After some
	retransmits, the connection will be dropped.
